untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'open-buy put-call ratio' and 'PIN measure' (Probability of Informed Trading), neither of which are in the allowed indicator list. The signal also requires contract volume data and put-call specific metrics that are not available. vol_ratio_20 was used as a proxy for volume concentration, but this does not accurately capture the put-call ratio or PIN dynamics described in the original academic research.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally based on options market microstructure (put-call ratios, open-buy volume, PIN) which requires options chain data and informed trading probability calculations not present in standard OHLCV indicator sets. The entry condition was approximated using vol_ratio_20 as a volume concentration proxy, but this is a weak substitute. The -35 basis point slope coefficient was converted to a -0.35% next-day return threshold for exit. A proper implementation would require custom options-based indicators.
